title: Missing Texture Plus
description: Decorative mod that adds blocks with the classic "missing texture" texture, including inverted versions
body:
![Thumbnail for the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e7fb0cd529ae9aa9d9c92e3d11bffb531b05610.png)

# Overview

This mod adds **4 decorative blocks** with the "missing texture" texture, all craftable in survival with colored concrete:

- Missing Texture Block
- Missing Texture Stairs
- Missing Texture Slab
- Missing Texture Wall

The mod also includes **inverted color** versions of these blocks:

- Inverted Missing Texture Block
- Inverted Missing Texture Stairs
- Inverted Missing Texture Slab
- Inverted Missing Texture Wall

All **recipes** can be found in the **Gallery**

## Localisation

This mod is currently **translated** to:

- Spanish
- Andalúh
